sections.heading: TNM

t_stages.description: Tumor less than or equal to 2 cm in greatest dimension
Tumor greater than 2 cm but less than or equal to 5 cm in greatest dimension
Tumor greater than 5 cm in greatest dimension
Tumor of any size invades adjacent organ(s), such as the vagina, urethra, or bladder

n_stages.description: Regional lymph nodes cannot be assessed
No tumor involvement of regional lymph node(s)
Tumor involvement of regional lymph node(s)
Tumor involvement of inguinal, mesorectal, superior rectal, internal iliac, or obturator lymph node(s)
Tumor involvement of external iliac lymph node(s)
Tumor involvement of N1b (external iliac) with any N1a node(s)
